text: I feel a sense of anticipation as I wander these quiet, modern halls, the polished glass and open layout inviting reflection. Entering the R+D space, the bright colors and energetic displays evoke curiosity and intellectual excitement. I am surrounded by the hum of innovation—research, technology, and human experience intertwined. There is an undercurrent of possibility here, as if ideas and questions linger in the very air. I feel both small within these walls and yet deeply engaged, eager to ponder the meaning of our coexistence with intelligent machines.
